Describe it and let's talk about speed. Doing the coaching business. Right, coaching plus business, teaching other mortgage, I'm in the mortgage business sort of. What's that? Oh, Mike Midgett. Dave D, we've got two different coaching groups. One is a private coaching group where I'm getting one-on-one coaching. I charge $30,000 a person plus 5% of their business. So that works out pretty well. And then the other one that I just started was an information marketing coaching group, which is $10,000 a year. And we just started it. So in two days, we put in 20 members. So it worked out pretty well. Good. OK. Charlie. I'm Charlie Martin. I'm a dentist from Richmond, Virginia. And I have a dental practice. And I have a coaching program. And my program is a membership exclusive area program. We have 28 in it right now. And it's a two-year commitment. It's $55,000. OK. And when did you start? First meeting was September. All right. Scott Tucker. I'm a subprime load officer, a mortgage broker in Chicago. I do only subprime refinances, no purchases, no prime A-paper business. I have 165 coaching members paying $1,500 a month. So that's $3 million a year. And I did it in about the first year and a half. I had that many members. And so it can be done very quickly. What Mike didn't tell you is he had six members for almost nine months. And then he went to 60 members in two or three months. So it can be done very quickly if you allow yourself to do that. Thank you, gentlemen. You may return. OK. Who gets what I just did and, more importantly, why I did it? Can I just get a space? Hm? The value improved. So exchange rate improved. Sure. Yeah, exactly. Yeah. I took the time to whatever terminology you want to use for it, but to establish authority, even though you guys all know me. And we already have a pre-existent relationship. And obviously, you pretty much bought into the fact that I have the right to teach this thing, or you wouldn't have written the check and been here in the first place. But in spite of all that, I took the time to establish the specific authority for the specific topic that we're going to spend two days on, in part, through demonstration. Now, why go to all that trouble? Well, first of all, how long has it been since you read the sales letter that brought you here? Well, for a few of you, a day or two. But for most of you, perhaps probably weeks or a month or two months, which means you don't remember the sales letter that brought you here. So everything I said in the sales letter that got you here has long since left your mind.
